title: Matrices, Job Dependencies, Outputs, and Immutable Artifacts · Automation Case: Ci Artifact Identity Digest Retention
summary: A matrix silently excludes a supported platform, multiple jobs overwrite one artifact name, downstream work trusts a string output, and executable permissions disappear after archive transfer. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ci artifact identity digest retention increment in matrix and artifact handoff contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Upload unique immutable artifacts with digest, producer, revision, content scope, retention, hidden-file policy, and no-secret review.
Write multiline-safe step outputs, promote validated job outputs, handle size and secret redaction limits, and parse downstream types explicitly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example matrix excludes one supported platform, overwrites artifact names, passes string outputs as booleans, and downloads an executable from another run. Prove graph results, types, producer identity, digest, layout, and trust. Competency probe: Upload unique immutable artifacts with digest, producer, revision, content scope, retention, hidden-file policy, and no-secret review. A defensible solution applies Ci Artifact Identity Digest Retention, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to matrix and artifact handoff contract.

content.code:
# Worked focus: ci-artifact-identity-digest-retention — Upload unique immutable artifacts with digest, producer, revision, content scope, retention, hidden-file policy, and no-secret review.
  # Evidence: ci-worked-gha-matrices-needs-outputs-artifacts-5
  - competency: ci-worked-gha-matrices-needs-outputs-artifacts-5
    artifact: handoff-contract.yaml
    decision: worked gha matrices needs outputs artifacts 5
    environment: single-job ephemeral self-hosted runner in a segmented subnet
    fault-injection: expire the only retained test artifact during incident reconstruction
    retained-proof: accessible redacted timeline with owner expiry and regression control
    case-key: worked5
    change: |
      matrix: node-22-24-by-ubuntu-macos-windows
      experimental: continue-only-declared-axis
      max-parallel: bounded
      needs: explicit-dag
      outputs: validated-json
      artifact-name: build-linux-x64-run8842
      artifact-digest: sha256-verified
      retention-days: 7
      hidden-files: excluded
    verify: enumerate matrix cases trace job results parse outputs and verify artifact ID digest layout retention and producer
    failure: Reject silent coverage exclusions, output type assumptions, artifact name reuse, hidden secret upload, or download as execution trust.
    repair: Prove matrix coverage, validate outputs, use unique immutable artifacts, verify digests and permissions, and bound retention.
content.caption: Runnable CI/CD workflow, artifact, release, and transfer-evidence contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
